title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Merck India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Merck India
jsonLd.description:
Merck India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!
